items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Main game ini sangat sangat satisfying d
items.summary: Main game ini sangat sangat satisfying dan seru bagi aku. To the point aja, reward di game ini lumayan kurang buat upgrade level 60+ dan skill para awakener. Sistem gacha nya sudah bagus menurutku. Aku harap bagian bahasa dalam game ini di perbagus lagi. Sayang sekali, game ini kurang di kenal, mungkin kalau bisa perbanyak iklan :3. Terimakasih.
items.author: Arcana

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Pretty good game. It takes time for you
items.summary: Pretty good game. It takes time for you to learn the mechanics. Ideally try to start in the major anniversary event to catch-up a new players.
items.author: Rishabh Sarkar

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 top tier card battler and top tier gacha
items.summary: top tier card battler and top tier gacha. amazing art, music, and features. every detail has heart and love put into this masterpiece of a game. oh, and the story is very good, too!
items.author: Kindred Red

items.title: [Google Play 好评] ★5 Bellissimo ma oscurato dal fatto che la
items.summary: Bellissimo ma oscurato dal fatto che la traduzione (pure "umana) in inglese è tradotta male. È proprio innaturale da leggere, seppur la trama sia bella.
items.author: Francesco Morselli
